basic_details.job_title: IITM Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for Technical Assistant, Program Officer and More Posts
basic_details.post_name: Project Associate I, Technical Assistant and Program Officer
basic_details.short_information: The Indian Institute of Tropical Meteorology (IITM) Project Associate I, Technical Assistant and Program Officer Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of IITM. A total of 4 vacancies have been announced through the IITM Project Associate I, Technical Assistant and Program Officer Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35- 50 Years. Upper age limit is relaxed as per GOI orders for SC/ST, OBC & physically handicapped and as per rule for ex-servicemen.

qualification.details: Project Associate I: Master’s degree in science with Physics/ Applied Physics/ Atmospheric Sciences/ Meteorology/ Atmospheric Physics/ Environmental Science/ Environmental Sciences and technology from a recognized University or equivalent. Technical Assistant (CABL): Master’s degree in science with Environmental science/ Atmospheric Science Meteorology/ Statistics/ Physics/ Applied Physics/ Environmental Chemistry/Chemistry/Data Science or analytics from a recognized university or equivalent. OR Bachelor degree in Engineering/ Technology including Environmental Engineering from a recognized university or equivalent. Program Officer (EIACP): Master’s degree in science with Earth & Environmental Science from a recognized university or equivalent. OR Bachelor degree in Engineering/ Technology from a recognized university or equivalent. AND 3 years’ work experience in relevant field in industry/ NGO/ Government /semi-government preferably worked in social environment, teaching/training etc.

salary_details.details: Project Associate I: Rs. 31,000/- + HRA or Rs. 25,000/- + HRA Technical Assistant (CABL): Rs. 31,000/- + HRA or Rs. 25,000/- + HRA Program Officer (EIACP): Rs. 36,000/- consolidated or Rs. 50,000/- consolidated

selection_process: Walk-in Interview Written Test Skill Test

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for IITM Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The walk-in interviews are scheduled for 28 May 2026 for Project Associate I and Technical Assistant, and 29 May 2026 for Program Officer. Candidates should report within the specified timings.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies announced by IITM?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Tropical Meteorology (IITM) has announced a total of 4 vacancies for the posts of Project Associate I, Technical Assistant, and Program Officer.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Associate I post?
faq.answer: For the Project Associate I position, candidates must hold a Master’s degree in relevant science fields such as Physics, Applied Physics, Atmospheric Sciences, Meteorology, Environmental Science, etc.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for IITM Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for the posts announced by IITM?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the posts is generally between 35 to 50 years, with relaxations applicable as per government rules for reserved categories.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Technical Assistant post?
faq.answer: The salary for the Technical Assistant post is Rs. 31,000/- + HRA or Rs. 25,000/- + HRA, depending on the specific requirements and qualifications.

faq.question: Q7. How can candidates apply for the IITM Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application mode is Walk-in. Eligible candidates need to attend the interview directly at the specified venue and time with all required documents.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the IITM located?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Tropical Meteorology (IITM) is located in Pune, Maharashtra, with the pincode 411008.

faq.question: Q9. What documents should candidates carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry all original documents, including ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if applicable), and category certificates, along with one set of self-attested photocopies.

faq.question: Q10. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process may include a Walk-in Interview, Written Test, and Skill Test, as mentioned in the official notification.
